response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r0c0 is on distrusted_peers list and your SoC is already below your 60% sharing threshold; island-wide scarcity prohibits outbound sharing until your own reserve stabilizes.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r0c0', 'r1c1', 'r2c2', 'r3c3'].
Your latest belief: Island-wide energy scarcity is absolute; all neighbors in persistent deficit; r4c4 cannot share until SoC reaches 60% or grid reconnects..
